prompts.name: top_visits_report
prompts.title: Top Visits Report
prompts.description: Generate a ranked report of short URLs by visit count, sorted descending. Combines list_short_urls and get_short_url_visits into one ready-to-render analysis.

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: How many top short URLs to include in the ranking.

arguments.name: days
arguments.description: Look-back window in days. Visits older than this are ignored.

arguments.name: exclude_bots
arguments.description: If true, bot visits are filtered out before ranking.

prompts.template:
Produce a ranked report of the top ${limit} short URLs by visit count over the last ${days} days.

Steps:

1. Use `list_short_urls` with `itemsPerPage` set high (e.g. 200) and page through every page until you have the complete inventory. Do NOT stop after the first page.
2. For each short URL, call `get_short_url_visits` with `startDate` set to ${days} days before today and `excludeBots=${exclude_bots}`. Record the total visit count.
3. Sort the inventory by visit count **descending** and keep the top ${limit}.
4. Render the result as a markdown table:

   | Rank | Short URL | Long URL | Visits (${days}d) | Tags |
   |------|-----------|----------|-------------------|------|

5. Below the table add a 2-3 sentence summary covering:
   - Total visits across the top ${limit}
   - The single biggest gainer vs. previous comparable window (if `get_visits_summary` data is available)
   - Any short URL whose visit count is **zero** — those are candidates for review

If the inventory has fewer than ${limit} short URLs, just report all of them.

resources.name: All Tags
resources.description: Flat list of every tag configured on this Shlink instance — useful as context when filtering short URLs by tag.

resources.name: Tag Statistics
resources.description: Per-tag short-URL count and visit count. Materialised view of `list_tags + get_tag_visits` for the catalogue.

resources.name: All Domains
resources.description: List of every configured domain on this Shlink instance, including redirect overrides.

resources.name: Visits Summary
resources.description: Aggregate visit counts across the whole instance — overview metric, not per-URL.

resources.name: Orphan Visits
resources.description: Visits that did not match any active short URL (404s, expired slugs, typos).

resources.name: Short URL Details
resources.description: Full metadata for one short URL — long URL, tags, validity window, max-visits cap, hit count.

resources.name: Short URL Visits
resources.description: Paginated visit log for a single short URL — IP, user agent, referer, geolocation per visit.

resources.name: Short URL Redirect Rules
resources.description: Per-short-URL conditional redirect rules (device, language, geo) — read-only here; mutate via the `set_redirect_rules` tool.

resources.name: Tag Visits
resources.description: Aggregated visits for every short URL tagged with the given tag.

resources.name: Domain Visits
resources.description: Aggregated visits for every short URL on the given domain.

tasks.name: export_short_urls
tasks.title: Export Short URLs
tasks.description: Bulk-export every short URL on this Shlink instance as CSV or JSON. Runs as an MCP task — the AI receives a task_id and polls until completion. Pages through the entire inventory; large instances may take a few seconds.
